prompt: You have 2 apples. A friend gives you 1 more. How many apples do you have now?
There are 4 cups on the table. You set down 1 more cup. How many cups are there now?
You see 3 birds in the yard. 2 more fly in. How many birds are there?
There are 2 cookies on a plate. You add 2 more. How many cookies in all?
You pick 3 flowers. Then you pick 1 more. How many flowers do you have?
Two cats sit on the porch. One more cat comes. How many cats are on the porch?
You have 6 buttons. You take away 1 button. How many buttons are left?
There are 4 plates in the sink. You wash 2 of them. How many plates are still in the sink?
You have 3 stamps. You use 1 stamp on a letter. How many stamps are left?
There are 5 oranges in a bowl. You eat 1. How many oranges are left?
